summary: Reduce SEO metadata issue baseline on public pages
description: Bounded website improvement: use reports/seo/baseline.md to fix a high-confidence cluster of short titles, short descriptions, long descriptions, or duplicate descriptions. Keep copy visitor-facing and avoid content-farm filler.
acceptance: At least one coherent page cluster has stronger title/meta description copy.
npm run check and npm run check:seo pass after the change.
The SEO baseline issue count or the selected issue cluster count is reduced, or any unchanged count is explained with evidence.

evidence.summary: Current SEO baseline: 283 issue occurrences; top issue types are short_description=101, short_title=93, long_description=54, duplicate_description=35.
